title: Job Post
description: A job posting. Multiple records per repo, keyed by TID.

postName.description: Descriptive, searchable name for this post (e.g. 'Senior Rust Engineer – Remote 2025')

applicationContact.description: DID of the person to contact for applications

datePosted.description: ISO 8601 date the post was published (YYYY-MM-DD)

validThrough.description: ISO 8601 date through which the posting is valid (YYYY-MM-DD)

url.description: Link to the canonical job posting or application page

jobLocation.description: Location of the job, e.g. 'Remote', 'Austin, TX', 'Remote (US only)'

shortDescription.description: Brief summary of the role. Markdown supported.

employmentType.description: e.g. full-time, part-time, contract, internship, temporary

jobTraits.description: Trait values for this role, mapping employer-defined job trait names to selected values.

employeeTraits.description: Trait values describing desired employee qualities, mapping employer-defined employee trait names to selected values.

active.description: Whether this post is, or has been, confirmed open for hiring. Absence or false means unconfirmed or closed.

traitValues.description: A trait name mapped to a list of selected values.

key.description: Trait name, conventionally matching one defined in the employer record

values.description: Selected values for this trait on this posting
